title: fraxinus griffithii var. koshunensis
intro: Fraxinus griffithii var. koshunensis, also known as the Koshun ash, is a variety of the Fraxinus griffithii tree that is native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koshun ash include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Koshun ash is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
